content: node --experimental-test-coverage (stable in Node 22, experimental in 18/20) collects V8 coverage for files loaded by the test process. Critical limitation: does NOT collect coverage from subprocess spawned via execFileSync (the pattern used by agentmap tests). agentmap.mjs runs as a child process — its lines are invisible to the parent test runner coverage. Two options: (1) c8 wraps the entire test run and sets NODE_V8_COVERAGE env var, collecting coverage from all spawned processes including the CLI subprocess — this is the correct approach for black-box CLI integration tests. (2) --experimental-test-coverage with --test-coverage-include only covers the test harness itself, not agentmap.mjs. Recommendation: use c8 for coverage reporting since tests spawn agentmap as subprocess.
